expectations.text: Response creates a TanStack Start API route for robots.txt
expectations.evidence: Code creates src/routes/robots.txt.ts using createAPIFileRoute('/robots.txt') with a GET handler that returns a Response with text/plain content type

Production rules include: User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /app/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /auth/
Disallow: /admin/

expectations.text: Response allows GPTBot/ClaudeBot for /blog/ and /docs/ only
expectations.evidence: Production rules include separate sections for GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, ClaudeBot, anthropic-ai, Claude-Web, Google-Extended each with Allow: /blog/, Allow: /docs/, Disallow: /

expectations.text: Response blocks AhrefsBot and SemrushBot entirely
expectations.evidence:
Production rules include: User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: / and User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

expectations.text: Response switches behavior based on environment (staging vs production)
expectations.evidence:
Code checks isStaging (via APP_ENV or hostname) and isProduction (NODE_ENV). Staging/non-production returns 'User-agent: *
Disallow: /' while production returns full crawl rules
Production rules include: Sitemap: ${baseUrl}/sitemap.xml which resolves to the full HTTPS URL
